enforcement_boundary: policy-decision-only; no tool execution or atomic nonce consumption
security_changes: Apply deny-path matching case-insensitively for portable safety
Bind shell, test, commit, deploy, publish, and spend to an exact action, tool, canonical arguments digest, and nonce
Deny high-risk authorization without explicit consumed-nonce state
Fail closed on noncanonical in-memory contract and operation values

atomicity_boundary.pdp: The evaluator checks exact operation binding and a caller-supplied snapshot of consumed nonces.
atomicity_boundary.pep: The enforcement point must atomically reserve or consume the nonce, confirm the allow decision against that state, and execute the exact bound operation.
atomicity_boundary.not_provided: The reference core and CLI do not persist nonce state or atomically combine nonce consumption with tool execution.

build.note: Candidate artifacts were rebuilt from the signed release-candidate source commit and remain held from publication until the external gates close.

remaining_limits: No runtime sandbox or tool interception
No persistent nonce or cumulative budget ledger
No atomic nonce-consumption plus execution boundary
